supporting_evidence: Invoice FPDEV900008 used exactly once (R900008 only)
Invoice FPDEV900009 used exactly once (R900009 only)
Vendor 开发供应商08 ≠ 开发供应商09 — different suppliers
Reason 五月办公用品甲 ≠ 五月办公用品乙 — different expense items
rationale: R900008 and R900009 share the same date (2025-05-05), amount (590.00), and expense type (office_supplies), but use different invoices by different employees for different purposes. Article 10 requires the same invoice; Article 11 requires the same employee. Neither condition is met. The records represent two independent, legitimate reimbursements.
